com.googlecode.iterm2.name: iTerm2
com.googlecode.iterm2.launch: osascript -e 'tell application "iTerm2"' -e 'activate' -e 'set w to (create window with default profile)' -e 'tell current session of w' -e 'write text "cd {path}"' -e 'end tell' -e 'end tell'
com.googlecode.iterm2.prompt_launch: osascript -e 'tell application "iTerm2"' -e 'activate' -e 'set w to (create window with default profile)' -e 'tell current session of w' -e 'write text "cd {path} && {prompt_cmd}"' -e 'end tell' -e 'end tell'
com.googlecode.iterm2.description: Opens a new iTerm2 window and cd's into the workspace path

com.apple.Terminal.name: Terminal
com.apple.Terminal.description: Opens a new Terminal window and cd's into the workspace path

com.mitchellh.ghostty.name: Ghostty
com.mitchellh.ghostty.description: Opens a new Ghostty window in the workspace path

com.github.wez.wezterm.name: WezTerm
com.github.wez.wezterm.description: Opens a new WezTerm window in the workspace path

dev.warp.Warp-Stable.name: Warp
dev.warp.Warp-Stable.description: Opens a new Warp window in the workspace path

com.microsoft.VSCode.name: Code
com.microsoft.VSCode.description: Opens the workspace path in a new VS Code window (requires `code` on PATH)

dev.zed.Zed.name: Zed
dev.zed.Zed.description: Opens the workspace path in a new Zed window (requires `zed` on PATH)

com.todesktop.230313mzl4w4u92.name: Cursor
com.todesktop.230313mzl4w4u92.description: Opens the workspace path in a new Cursor window (requires `cursor` on PATH)

com.google.Chrome.name: Google Chrome
com.google.Chrome.description: Opens a new Chrome window using the dedicated 'hub' profile

com.apple.Safari.name: Safari
com.apple.Safari.url_launch: osascript -e 'tell application "Safari"' -e 'activate' -e 'make new document' -e 'set URL of document 1 to "{url}"' -e 'end tell'
com.apple.Safari.description: Activates Safari and creates a new document (empty window)

com.apple.TextEdit.name: TextEdit
com.apple.TextEdit.launch: osascript -e 'tell application "TextEdit" to activate' -e 'tell application "TextEdit" to make new document'
com.apple.TextEdit.description: Opens a new blank TextEdit document (useful as a scratch notes pad)
